features: 【Product Specification】A set of 10 girls' fabric-covered headbands with flowers, polka dots, stars, and heart-shaped designs. The diameter of the headbands is approx 4.5 inch (11.43cm) , its height is about 5.5 inch (13.97cm), its width is 1cm, fit for most of young girls.
【Various styles】 Headbands have 10 different styles. The quantity and colour are enough to match different clothes and occasions. A great hair accessories perfect for girls,toddler and big girls.
【Good Quality】Extremely comfortable and durable. Not easy to slip, do not hurt the scalp, so it is worth your purchase.
【Fashion & Popular】Simple and plain design, but very beautiful and attractive. It can be a nice match for jeans wear or evening dress, making a unique and beautiful look.
【Multi-purpose】Can be a great gift for kids and friends. Perfect for special occasions, birthday, school, daily and ceremonies.
